headline: Top exec at $1.7 trillion Wall Street giant makes bold crypto call
summary: Investors have spent the last few years chasing AI growth by buying shares of companies like Nvidia and Microsoft. But a senior Wall Street executive says that strategy may not work for what comes next. Sandy Kaul, Head of Digital Assets and Innovation at Franklin Templeton (NYSE: BEN), an asset ...
